Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class TestGenParser

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.TestGenParser
public class TestGenParser extends AbstractTests
This test class aims at supporting generic parser development.

    testPredicateVariableReservedName()
    Ensure that predicate variable names live in a different scope, and in particular that they can have the same name as a reserved word.
    void
    testPredicateVariableUserReservedName()
    Ensure that predicate variable names live in a different scope, and in particular that they can have the same name as a reserved word created by a mathematical extension.

    • testPredicateVariableReservedName

      public void testPredicateVariableReservedName() throws Exception
      Ensure that predicate variable names live in a different scope, and in particular that they can have the same name as a reserved word.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testPredicateVariableUserReservedName

      public void testPredicateVariableUserReservedName() throws Exception
      Ensure that predicate variable names live in a different scope, and in particular that they can have the same name as a reserved word created by a mathematical extension.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • mCSet

    • testExtensionInCset

      public void testExtensionInCset() throws Exception
      Reproduce bug that makes lambda not parse its unparsed string. When the bug is present, the test fails like: expected:<λx·x=0 ∣ x asso 1> but was:<(λx·x=0 ∣ x) asso 1> Lambda operator priority used to be considered when parsing.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testExtendedRelationalPredicate

      public void testExtendedRelationalPredicate() throws Exception
      Throws:
      Exception

    • testQUnionError

      public void testQUnionError() throws Exception
      A missing belongs to operator does not produce a cryptic error message.
      Throws:
      Exception
